name: Curry Glazed Duck Legs
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the jalapeno pepper, ginger, curry, garlic, salt, and pepper in a blender or food processor. Add just enough olive oil to form a fine paste of the ingredients.
2. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C).
3. Rinse the duck legs in cold water and pat dry. Rub the paste mixture on the duck legs in a roasting pan.
4. Bake, uncovered, for one hour. Remove the duck legs from the pan and discard any accumulated fat and juices.
5. Reduce the oven temperature to 325°F (160°C).
6. In a small bowl, combine the juice of two oranges, two limes, and chicken stock. Return the duck legs to the pan and pour the orange, lime, and chicken stock mixture over the duck legs.
7. Cover the pan with foil and return to the oven for 20 to 30 minutes.
8. Remove the duck legs from the oven. Drain off any excess fat and reserve the pan juices in a small saucepan. Increase the oven temperature to 350°F (175°C).
9. Return the legs to the pan and roast, uncovered, for 5 to 10 minutes to re-crisp the skin.
10. Serve the duck on a bed of steamed rice or mashed potatoes. Pour the heated pan juices into a gravy boat and serve at the table. Sauteed apples, onions, and red cabbage make a great accompaniment.
